title: amaryllis × breviflora
intro: Amaryllis × breviflora, also known as the Naked Lady or Zephyranthes candida, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Amaryllis × breviflora include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are applied topically or taken internally to treat various health issues.
